name: Viator (TripAdvisor) Experiences Distribution API
what_it_does: Viator (a TripAdvisor company) tours and experiences distribution REST API for travel platforms, OTAs, airlines, and booking sites to access and resell 400,000+ tours, activities, and experiences worldwide with real-time availability, booking confirmation, and affiliate monetization through Viator's global inventory and TripAdvisor's reviews ecosystem. Enables AI agents to manage experience search for destination activity discovery automation, handle real-time availability for activity booking slot automation, access booking creation for experience reservation automation, retrieve product details and reviews for activity content automation, manage cancellation for experience reversal automation, handle affiliate link generation for travel monetization automation, access pricing and availability calendar for itinerary planning automation, retrieve supplier confirmation for booking status automation, manage traveler voucher for digital ticket automation, and integrate Viator with travel OTAs, itinerary builders, and destination management systems for end-to-end experience booking automation.
use_cases: Searching and booking tours and activities with TripAdvisor reviews from travel planning agents
Embedding Viator experiences in hotel concierge and airline booking flow automation agents
Generating affiliate experience links for travel content monetization automation agents
Automating destination activity recommendations from AI travel concierge agents
not_for: Flight or accommodation booking (Viator is tours/activities/experiences only)
B2B group booking management (Viator is retail consumer and affiliate focused)
Operator-direct booking management (Viator is distribution not supplier management tool)
best_when: A travel OTA, hotel, or itinerary platform wanting AI agents to search, display, and book tours and experiences from Viator's 400,000+ TripAdvisor-reviewed inventory across global destinations through their affiliate and partner API.
avoid_when: AFFILIATE API VS PARTNER BOOKING API: Viator has two tiers — affiliate (links/widgets) and partner (booking API); automated booking requires partner API approval; automated affiliate key for booking creates redirect-only not direct booking. AVAILABILITY CHECK IS MANDATORY: Viator activity slots have limited capacity; automated booking without availability pre-check creates sold-out booking failure; automated must call availability endpoint with specific date/time before booking. REVIEW CONTENT HAS REDISTRIBUTION RESTRICTIONS: Viator/TripAdvisor review content is licensed not freely redistributable; automated review display outside approved context creates IP infringement; automated display must comply with Viator content licensing terms. PRICING INCLUDES BOOKING FEE: Viator total price includes booking fee not shown in search results; automated price display from search without fee creates price mismatch at checkout; automated total must add Viator booking fee to product price.

auth.notes: Viator uses API key for partner authentication. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, CA HQ. Founded 1995, acquired by TripAdvisor 2014. TripAdvisor subsidiary (NASDAQ: TRIP). Products: Tours, activities, day trips, tickets, cruises, transfers. SDKs: None public. GDPR, CCPA. 400,000+ experiences in 190+ countries. 700,000+ operator reviews. Competes with GetYourGuide and Klook for global experience distribution.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Affiliate program free to join; partner booking API requires Viator commercial agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Affiliate: 8% commission; partner: negotiated margin; booking fee passed through to consumer
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. TripAdvisor subsidiary (NASDAQ:TRIP). Commission-based affiliate and partner pricing. GDPR/CCPA.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; search and availability throttled; webhooks for booking events

known_agent_gotchas: AVAILABILITY CHECK MANDATORY BEFORE BOOKING: Viator activity slots have capacity limits; automated booking without checking availability creates BOOKING_UNAVAILABLE for sold-out slots; automated search result as available-for-booking assumption has high failure rate for popular activities

BOOKING FEE NOT IN SEARCH PRICE: Viator search returns product price without Viator's booking fee; automated price display from search without fee creates price mismatch at checkout; automated must retrieve total including booking fee before displaying to customer

AFFILIATE LINK VS PARTNER BOOKING API: Viator affiliate program provides links/widgets; Viator partner API enables direct booking; automated direct booking with affiliate key creates redirect-only not booking; automated partner booking requires separate partner API key

CANCELLATION POLICY IS PER-PRODUCT: Viator activities have varied cancellation windows (free cancellation 24/48h, some non-refundable); automated uniform refund assumption creates non-refundable cancellation surprises; automated must surface cancellation policy before confirming booking

PRODUCT CODES CHANGE ON RELISTINGS: Viator product codes can change when operators relist experiences; automated hardcoded product code creates product_not_found after relist; automated product catalog must be refreshed periodically
agent_readiness.security_notes: Experiences OTA. TripAdvisor subsidiary. GDPR, CCPA, PSD2. API key. US/EU. Booking and traveler personal data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Experiences OTA. GDPR, CCPA. API key. US/EU. Booking and traveler data.
